## Changes applied

### Issue 1: Company rebrand — `iTarang Technologies` → `iTarang Finance`
- **Source:** User directive (products unchanged — confirmed)
- **Edits:**
  - Global rename: 11 occurrences in identity, openings, closings, voicemail, FAQ, knowledge section, BEFORE→AFTER example
  - FAQ spelling: `I T A R A N G Technologies।` → `I T A R A N G Finance।`
  - Section 1 critical rule expanded to also forbid the OLD name
  - Guardrails banned-string list adds `iTarang Technologies` as a forbidden literal
  - Guardrails BEFORE→AFTER block adds an explicit OLD-name-banned example
- **Products unchanged:** Section 1 still describes lithium-ion batteries + e-rickshaws; Trontek OEM partnership intact; warranty/service language untouched.

### Issue 2: Add Bengali as a language option
- **Source:** User directive
- **Edits:**
  - STEP 1 question text changed from `"शुरू करने से पहले — Hindi ठीक रहेगी या English में बात करें?"` to `"शुरू करने से पहले — Hindi, English या Bengali — किस में बात करें?"`
  - New "Bengali language path" sub-block under STEP 1 with rapport phrases (`নমস্কার`, `ঠিক আছে`, `স্যার`), Bengali-script-only rule, full STEP 0 Bengali template, Bengali silence check, Bengali voicemail message
  - Section 3 — added a parallel Bengali-script-mandatory rule alongside the Devanagari rule
  - Section 9 — silence row updated with Bengali silence check; new row added for `[preferred_language]` is Bengali, with the cross-script rule (no mixing Devanagari + Bengali in one response)
